title: Section 2A
content: 2A. [Construction of references to laws not in force in Jammu and Kashmir.] Omitted by the Jammu and Kashmir Reorganisation (Adaptation of Central Laws) Order, 2020, vide Notification No. S.O. 1123(E) dated (18-3-2020) and vide Union Territory of Ladakh Reorganisation (Adaptation of Central Laws) Order, 2020, Notification No. S.O. 3774(E), dated (23-10-2020)].
